description: Composition Brown and navy blue plaid shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-sleeve button, spread collar, buttoned chest placket, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, white stitch detailing, embroidered lettering over the left chest pocket and a curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with mild detergent Do not soak, wring or twist Dry in shade Fold and stack to maintain shape Moderate warm iron Do not iron on print or embroidery The patch pockets on the chest and embroidered brand lettering adds rugged styling to this shirt from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 19"
